ممن صنفوا","scholarly_function":"opinion_statement","confidence":0.87},{"segment_index":11,"start_word":494,"end_word":525,"text_snippet":"فلابن مالك مؤلفات في العربية كثيرة متعددة","scholarly_function":"opinion_statement","confidence":0.82},{"segment_index":12,"start_word":526,"end_word":562,"text_snippet":"ومن هذه المؤلفات كتابه","scholarly_function":"narration","confidence":0.85},{"segment_index":13,"start_word":563,"end_word":634,"text_snippet":"وقد كثر إقبال العلماء على هذا الكتاب من بين","scholarly_function":"opinion_statement","confidence":0.79},{"segment_index":14,"start_word":635,"end_word":713,"text_snippet":"وشروح هذا الكتاب أكثر من أن تتسع هذه الكلمة","scholarly_function":"narration","confidence":0.88},{"segment_index":15,"start_word":714,"end_word":763,"text_snippet":"وقد شرح ابن هشام الخلاصة مرتين: إحداهما في كتابه","scholarly_function":"narration","confidence":0.93},{"segment_index":16,"start_word":764,"end_word":1001,"text_snippet":"وممن شرح الخلاصة العلامة محمد بدر الدين بن","scholarly_function":"narration","confidence":0.95},{"segment_index":17,"start_word":1002,"end_word":1054,"text_snippet":"وقد شرح الكتاب -
